channel.title: AION Analytics OSS Releases
channel.description: Announcements for AION Analytics public package and model updates.

item.title: AION India Event Intelligence 1.0.2
item.description:
Project: AION India Event Intelligence Version: 1.0.2 Safety: behavior clarification, safe upgrade Summary: Display rename to AION India Event Intelligence and public output-contract cleanup.
Highlights: - Standardizes the public product identity as AION India Event Intelligence. - Standardizes the output around sector_vector and sector_directional_bias. - Removes public recommendation framing from docs, MCP metadata, and tutorial surfaces.
Upgrade: pip install --upgrade aion-news-to-signal
Validation: - python -c "from aion_news_to_signal import analyze; r=analyze('RBI hikes repo rate by 25 bps'); print('sector_vector' in r); print('sector_directional_bias' in r)"
PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/aion-news-to-signal/ Documentation: https://dashboard.aiondashboard.site/models/news-to-signal API Gateway: https://dashboard.aiondashboard.site/systems/api-gateway Registration: https://dashboard.aiondashboard.site/access/register

item.title: aion-indian-market-calendar 1.1.1
item.description:
Project: aion-indian-market-calendar Version: 1.1.1 Safety: safe patch Summary: Timezone fallback fix for environments without system tzdata.
Highlights: - Added tzdata dependency for ZoneInfo compatibility. - Added pytz fallback for constrained runtimes such as Pyodide. - Corrected naive datetime attachment in fallback mode.
Upgrade: pip install --upgrade aion-indian-market-calendar
Validation: - python -c "from aion_indian_market_calendar import is_market_open; print(is_market_open('NSE'))" - python -c "from aion_indian_market_calendar import IndiaMarketCalendar; from datetime import datetime; import pytz; cal=IndiaMarketCalendar(); print(cal.get_session(datetime(2026,1,27,9,5,tzinfo=pytz.timezone('Asia/Kolkata')), market='NFO') is not None)"
PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/aion-indian-market-calendar/ Documentation: https://huggingface.co/datasets/AION-Analytics/aion-indian-market-calendar

item.title: aion-indian-market-calendar 1.1.0
item.description:
Project: aion-indian-market-calendar Version: 1.1.0 Safety: behavior change, controlled upgrade Summary: Canonical market resolution fix for aliases and index inputs.
Highlights: - NFO and FNO now resolve to NSE_EQUITY_DERIVATIVES. - NIFTY and BANKNIFTY now resolve to derivatives by default. - Unknown market inputs now raise ValueError instead of failing silently.
Upgrade: pip install --upgrade aion-indian-market-calendar
Validation: - python -c "from aion_indian_market_calendar import IndiaMarketCalendar; from datetime import datetime; import pytz; cal=IndiaMarketCalendar(); dt=datetime(2026,1,27,9,20,tzinfo=pytz.timezone('Asia/Kolkata')); print(cal.get_session(dt, market='NFO') is not None); print(cal.get_session(dt, market='NIFTY') is not None)"
PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/aion-indian-market-calendar/1.1.0/ Documentation: https://huggingface.co/datasets/AION-Analytics/aion-indian-market-calendar
